_meta.purpose: Mock api/research.js Step 8 output for Dashboard rendering test
_meta.audit_note: This is NOT real LLM output. Hand-written based on docs/research/PAIR_TRADE_PHASE_PLAYBOOK.md to validate Dashboard forward-compat null-handling on phaseTiming field.

pulse.e: Profit pool migration thesis: GM compressing -3.67pp 5q while peer Innolight +11.41pp same period. Phase 1 momentum still active until Q3 2026 earnings; Phase 2 catalyst ~2026-10. NOT a today short.
pulse.z: 利润池迁移 thesis: GM 5 季度压缩 -3.67pp, 同期 peer 旭创 +11.41pp. Phase 1 动能至 Q3 2026 财报; Phase 2 催化 ~2026-10. 现在 NOT short.

problem.e: Mid-stream optical components supplier; 63% sales via Fabrinet (intermediary, no direct customer access).
problem.z: 中游光学组件供应商; 63% 销售经 Fabrinet (代工中介, 不直接对接终端云厂商).

mechanism.e: Fabrinet relationship + product mix shift to active optical engines (lower margin) creates negative operating leverage.
mechanism.z: Fabrinet 关系 + 产品 mix 转向有源光引擎 (低毛利) 产生 negative operating leverage.

moneyFlow.e: Fabrinet → 天孚 → upstream chips. 天孚 captures ~15-20% margin in middle of value chain.
moneyFlow.z: Fabrinet → 天孚 → 上游芯片. 天孚在价值链中游取 ~15-20% margin.

marketBelieves.e: AI capex tailwind benefits all optical names equally; 天孚 will participate in CPO upside.
marketBelieves.z: AI capex 顺风惠及所有光通信公司; 天孚将享受 CPO 上行空间.

weBelieve.e: Profit pool is migrating from middle (天孚) to integration platform (Innolight). 天孚 is structurally squeezed, not benefiting.
weBelieve.z: 利润池正从中游 (天孚) 向下游集成 (Innolight) 迁移. 天孚被结构性挤压, 并非受益方.

mechanism.e: 天孚 GM compresses as product mix shifts active (lower margin). Cost growth +71% > revenue growth +57% (negative OL).
mechanism.z: 天孚 GM 压缩因 product mix 偏 active (低毛利). 成本 +71% > 收入 +57% (负 OL).

rightIf.e: Q3 2026 GM <47% AND Innolight GM >50% — divergence confirms thesis.
rightIf.z: Q3 2026 GM <47% 且 Innolight GM >50% — 分化验证 thesis.

wrongIf.e: Fabrinet公告 deepening 天孚 partnership OR 天孚 GM stops declining for 2 consecutive quarters.
wrongIf.z: Fabrinet公告深化合作 OR 天孚 GM 连续 2 季停止下滑.

whatChangesOurMind.e: Major Fabrinet exclusivity contract OR successful pivot to passive components dominant pricing.
whatChangesOurMind.z: Fabrinet 重大排他合同 OR 成功转向无源器件主导定价权.

rewardToRisk.upsideIfRight: +30% to +50% (mean revert from 138x PE to ~80x PE over 12-18 months)
rewardToRisk.downsideIfWrong: -15% to -20% (further multiple expansion to 160x if AI mania extends)

phase1MarketBelief.durationEstimate: 2-4 quarters from now (2026-05) until Q3 2026 earnings disclosure (~2026-10-11)
whyMarketKeepsBuying: AI capex 普涨叙事仍主导 — NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL/META/AMZN 合计 capex Q4 2025 +64% YoY, 2026 预计 +53% YoY
天孚 FY2025 表观营收 +58.79% 强劲增长, 市场尚未在估值中计入 GM 同比 -3.67pp 压缩
光通信 / CPO 主题资金面活跃, 投资者按 sub-sector 配置而非个股选择
Fabrinet 关系 (63.31% 销售) 表面稳定, 客户没公开换供应商, 没明显警示信号
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: Fabrinet 公告 (任何时间): 减少天孚份额 / 引入新光引擎供应商
卖方分析师下调评级 (中信/中金/海通中任意 1 家从 BUY → HOLD/SELL)
北向资金 (Tushare moneyflow_hsgt) 5 日累计 north_money 在 300394.SZ 上转负

optionalLongPlay.sizing: 0% — short 信念强, 不浪费仓位 chase phase 1 momentum

catalystForReversion: Q3 2026 财报 (~2026-10-11 预计披露): GM 继续压缩跌破 47%, 验证 multi-quarter trend
光引擎产品 ASP 公告大幅低于市场预期 (-15% 或更多)
Fabrinet / 大客户公告分散光引擎采购 (引入 2 家以上替代供应商)
天孚自身公告战略调整 — 主动降低光引擎 mix 比例或关闭某条产品线
phase2RealityRecognition.estimatedTiming: Q3 2026 earnings ~2026-10-11 (主 catalyst); secondary windows: 2026-08 Q2 财报 (early sign), 2026-12 行业 Capex guidance

shortPlay.entryTrigger: 等 phase_1_weakening 第一个信号出现 (Q2 财报 GM<50% 或 Fabrinet 公告)

positionSizingCurve.prePhase1Weakening: 0% (现在 2026-05 — 不进场, 等 Q2 财报触发)
positionSizingCurve.phase1WeakeningConfirmed: 30% (Q2 财报后 GM<50% 确认, 或 Fabrinet 公告确认 — 任一第一次出现)
positionSizingCurve.phase2CatalystImminent: 80% (Q3 财报披露前 1-2 周, 或财报当周如已确认 GM<47%)

narrative_shift.z: AI 普涨覆盖分化现实

risks.e: AI mania extends, multiple expansion to 160x PE
risks.z: AI 狂热延续, 估值扩张到 160x

crowd.z: 拥挤多头, 叙事驱动

nextActions.e: Wait for Q2 2026 earnings (~2026-08) — do NOT enter short before then
Monitor Fabrinet announcements + sell-side rating changes weekly
nextActions.z: 每周监控 Fabrinet 公告 + 卖方评级变化
